programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Condo Reno for Family Beach Trips in Belleair Bluffs, Florida
programme.desc: A retired couple seeks a beachfront condo to rent out and to host their big family with lots of grandchildren. They entrust a contractor to make extensive cosmetic updates to an outdated unit to turn it into their dream beach getaway.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.

programme.title: Design Down Under
programme.desc: A couple calls on Georgia and Richie to transform their cramped bungalow without stripping away its charm; Georgia and Richie maximize the floor plan to create the Italian farmhouse-inspired space the couple has always dreamed of.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Condo Reno for Family Beach Trips in Belleair Bluffs, Florida
programme.desc: A retired couple seeks a beachfront condo to rent out and to host their big family with lots of grandchildren. They entrust a contractor to make extensive cosmetic updates to an outdated unit to turn it into their dream beach getaway.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Condo Reno for Family Beach Trips in Belleair Bluffs, Florida
programme.desc: A retired couple seeks a beachfront condo to rent out and to host their big family with lots of grandchildren. They entrust a contractor to make extensive cosmetic updates to an outdated unit to turn it into their dream beach getaway.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Bathrooms, Kitchen and Balconies on North Hutchinson Island
programme.desc: An engaged couple from Jacksonville are ready to start a new chapter together on the shores of North Hutchinson Island, Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovating a York, Maine Family Getaway
programme.desc: A native New Englander who grew up vacationing on the shores of York, Maine, is hoping to achieve his dream of owning a home in town; property in York isn't cheap, but having a place to build memories could be worth dealing with a major renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Cute Cottage on the Gulf Shore
programme.desc: A newly married woman gets to use her interior design skills to renovate her own beach house, creating a cozy getaway and a source of extra rental income for her family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Shawn are best friends and work colleagues; they are looking to pool their money together to buy a vacation lakefront property that gives them each space of their own; first, they view a fully restored house that was built in the 1960s.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: After retiring from technical jobs, Cathy and Mark are caretakers of Cathy's brother and are looking for a lakefront house that gives them room to focus on their art and a space for Cathy's brother to call his own.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Michelle and Phil are looking for a lakefront home where they can entertain family and friends; Phil, a chef, is looking for a property with a great kitchen.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Bruce and Darka have recently retired; they are also active scuba divers and want to find a lakefront property that will accommodate their passion for the sport, as well as entertaining friends and family.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife Frances and Shawn, who are both working professionals, have four active sons and are currently searching for their dream property that can accommodate all six family members.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Shawn are best friends and work colleagues; they are looking to pool their money together to buy a vacation lakefront property that gives them each space of their own; first, they view a fully restored house that was built in the 1960s.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: After retiring from technical jobs, Cathy and Mark are caretakers of Cathy's brother and are looking for a lakefront house that gives them room to focus on their art and a space for Cathy's brother to call his own.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Michelle and Phil are looking for a lakefront home where they can entertain family and friends; Phil, a chef, is looking for a property with a great kitchen.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Bruce and Darka have recently retired; they are also active scuba divers and want to find a lakefront property that will accommodate their passion for the sport, as well as entertaining friends and family.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife Frances and Shawn, who are both working professionals, have four active sons and are currently searching for their dream property that can accommodate all six family members.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Shawn are best friends and work colleagues; they are looking to pool their money together to buy a vacation lakefront property that gives them each space of their own; first, they view a fully restored house that was built in the 1960s.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: After retiring from technical jobs, Cathy and Mark are caretakers of Cathy's brother and are looking for a lakefront house that gives them room to focus on their art and a space for Cathy's brother to call his own.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Michelle and Phil are looking for a lakefront home where they can entertain family and friends; Phil, a chef, is looking for a property with a great kitchen.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Bruce and Darka have recently retired; they are also active scuba divers and want to find a lakefront property that will accommodate their passion for the sport, as well as entertaining friends and family.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside; when the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple sets out to build a tree-house retreat in northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains; although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with all of their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A young man designs his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go; he and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Cal Clark wants to build a cabin in Colorado, where his friend, Billy Joe, is starting an off-the-grid community; Cal and Billy Joe race to finish the cabin in time for hunting season, but a setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A man surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: Shipping Container Into Instant Backyard Retreat
programme.desc: In South Dakota, Cappie and Alex transform a 20-foot shipping container into a stunning backyard space with barnwood accents, a misting system, and custom details -- creating a warm, inviting place to gather, relax, and celebrate.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: A Natural Pool Oasis for All Seasons
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex carve out a luxury natural swimming pool with a handmade boulder wall, eco-filtration and native landscaping to create an all-season oasis and the ultimate gathering spot for friends, family and guests.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: When a couple struggles to realize their vision for the family home, Kate and Amy take on the challenge with a fresh perspective, showing them how to incorporate the style of three generations into a brand new design.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: The heart of a newlywed couple's unique historic home is the kitchen, but it's dysfunctional and dated, so, it's up to Kate and Amy to transform it into a space that has modern functionality without losing its rustic charm.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: Shipping Container Into Instant Backyard Retreat
programme.desc: In South Dakota, Cappie and Alex transform a 20-foot shipping container into a stunning backyard space with barnwood accents, a misting system, and custom details -- creating a warm, inviting place to gather, relax, and celebrate.

programme.desc: Cappie and Alex carve out a luxury natural swimming pool with a handmade boulder wall, eco-filtration and native landscaping to create an all-season oasis and the ultimate gathering spot for friends, family and guests.

programme.desc: When a couple struggles to realize their vision for the family home, Kate and Amy take on the challenge with a fresh perspective, showing them how to incorporate the style of three generations into a brand new design.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: A Natural Pool Oasis for All Seasons
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex carve out a luxury natural swimming pool with a handmade boulder wall, eco-filtration and native landscaping to create an all-season oasis and the ultimate gathering spot for friends, family and guests.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife Frances and Shawn, who are both working professionals, have four active sons and are currently searching for their dream property that can accommodate all six family members.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Best friends and single moms Karen and Sarah are searching for a new home to purchase together.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Urban professionals Jeremy and Jonathan have been living in an upscale condo in the downtown core; their lack of living space and love for the water has prompted them to search for a lakefront property with lots of room.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chelsea and Spencer's are looking to purchase lakefront property to enjoy with friends, family and their dog, Henry; the first property on their search is a new build that sits on 5 acres, with an amazing chef's kitchen and an oversized primary bedroom with a vaulted ceiling; next up is a more rustic property a Scandinavian style log home; this unique lake house has gorgeous, oversized raw timber beams and a classic stone fireplace. It also comes with a private beach.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife Kelly and Michael are both professional bodybuilders who work together and train together.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Argentina and Paolo are searching for lakefront property that can accommodate their blended family; they visit three different properties to choose from.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Best friends and single moms Karen and Sarah are searching for a new home to purchase together.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Urban professionals Jeremy and Jonathan have been living in an upscale condo in the downtown core; their lack of living space and love for the water has prompted them to search for a lakefront property with lots of room.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chelsea and Spencer's are looking to purchase lakefront property to enjoy with friends, family and their dog, Henry; the first property on their search is a new build that sits on 5 acres, with an amazing chef's kitchen and an oversized primary bedroom with a vaulted ceiling; next up is a more rustic property a Scandinavian style log home; this unique lake house has gorgeous, oversized raw timber beams and a classic stone fireplace. It also comes with a private beach.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife Kelly and Michael are both professional bodybuilders who work together and train together.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Argentina and Paolo are searching for lakefront property that can accommodate their blended family; they visit three different properties to choose from.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Best friends and single moms Karen and Sarah are searching for a new home to purchase together.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Urban professionals Jeremy and Jonathan have been living in an upscale condo in the downtown core; their lack of living space and love for the water has prompted them to search for a lakefront property with lots of room.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chelsea and Spencer's are looking to purchase lakefront property to enjoy with friends, family and their dog, Henry; the first property on their search is a new build that sits on 5 acres, with an amazing chef's kitchen and an oversized primary bedroom with a vaulted ceiling; next up is a more rustic property a Scandinavian style log home; this unique lake house has gorgeous, oversized raw timber beams and a classic stone fireplace. It also comes with a private beach.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Restoring a post and beam mid-century modern home that lost much of its original style.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: During the restoration of a 1906 Victorian house, Brett solves a mystery behind a decorative ring on the front of the house while returning interior details like the fireplace and staircase to their original glory.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: While the previous owners kept the house in good condition, the home still needs more usable space and more light for new homeowners with a baby on the way.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A cottage that's right out of a fairy tale, but needs some magic; enhancing the architectural style; a new kitchen and breakfast nook.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A 1912 Transitional Victorian house is a hybrid of styles, combining Victorian flourish with arts and crafts simplicity; Brett manages to restore the home, blend two architectural styles and find space for a new bedroom for the owners' daughter.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A large 1926 Tudor Revival home needs a lot of work before the new homeowners move in; the cramped kitchen was remodeled in the 1980's so the style doesn't match the rest of this 1926 house.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.sub-title: Happy to Make a New Home Feel Old
programme.desc: Gray brings her knowledge and expertise to the home of Bryan Mise, a neighbor and dear friend, who is building a new house in Summerville's historic district; Gray, Mike and Grumpy help Bryan make this new build feel like a home from the early 1900s.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays help a first-time homeowner bring back character to the 1940s home she describes as her Millennial Mansion; with features like a reclaimed brick porch, custom woodwork inside and a colorful new kitchen, it's a complete transformation.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.sub-title: Happy to Make a New Home Feel Old
programme.desc: Gray brings her knowledge and expertise to the home of Bryan Mise, a neighbor and dear friend, who is building a new house in Summerville's historic district; Gray, Mike and Grumpy help Bryan make this new build feel like a home from the early 1900s.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays enhance a 1903 Craftsman for a 98-year-old who has lived in the home since the 1950s; together they restore the main bedroom and kitchen to their former glory.
